zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria於1156年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 斯塔恩格安德斯時，她的父親Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria V34歲，母親Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach34歲。她和Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII至少有8個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1218年1月2日在德國貝也爾茲包格享年62歲，埋葬在德國貝也爾茲包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria于1156年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 斯塔恩格安德斯时，她的父亲Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria V34岁，母亲Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach34岁。她和Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII至少有8个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1218年1月2日在德国貝也爾茲包格享年62岁，埋葬在德国貝也爾茲包格。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Bavaria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Collette, Marcel, Normand, Raoul.

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria was born in 1156, in Andechs, Starnberg, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria V, was 34 and her mother, Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, was 34. She had at least 8 sons and 2 daughters with Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII. She died on 2 January 1218, in Würzburg, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 62, and was buried in Würzburg, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria est née en 1156, à Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria V, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles avec Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1218, à Würzburg, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Würzburg, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria 1156 in Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria V 34 und ihre Mutter Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach 34. Sie hatte mit Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Januar 1218 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Würzburg, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Würzburg, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria è nata il nel 1156 nel Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria V, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie con Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII. Morì il 2 gennaio 1218, nel Würzburg, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Würzburg, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavariaが1156年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス スターンバーグアンデチスで生まれた時，父Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria Vは34歳，母Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbachは34歳であった。彼女はPoppo Count Of Henneberg XIIとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1218年1月2日にドイツバイエルンウuルズブルグで62歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンウuルズブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Dießen am Ammersee, Landsberg am Lech, B: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 랜드스버그 아 렉h 디ss 아 아머시

ko.lifeSummary: Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria(이)가 1156년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 스타른버그 앤데크스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria V(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1218년 1월 2일 독일 베이른 wu르즈버그에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 wu르즈버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria nasceu em 1156, em Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria V, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas com Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII. Ela faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1218, em Würzburg, Bayern, Alemanha, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Würzburg, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.Dießen am Ammersee, Landsberg am Lech, B: диеssен ам аммирси, ландкрис ландсбирг ам леч, беиирн, Германия
ru.Dassel, Einbeck, Hannover, Preußen, Duit: дассел, крис эинбекк, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria родилась в 1156 г. в местности андечс, ландкрис старнбирг, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria V было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери от Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII. Она умерла 2 января 1218 г. в местности вuрзбург, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности вuрзбург, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria nació en 1156, en Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Berthold Duke Of Meran, Count Of Andech, Innsbruck, & Wolfrathausen, Margrave Of Istria V, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas con Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII. Murió el 2 de enero de 1218, en Würzburg, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Würzburg, Bayern, Alemania.
